en_title: Brandon Sanderson Explains Why He Chose the One Piece Studio to Adapt His Epic Sci-Fi Series
cn_title: Sanderson谈为何选《海贼王》制作公司改编科幻巨著

paragraphs.en: It was recently announced that Brandon Sanderson would be working with Tomorrow Studios on an adaptation of his popular YA series Skyward. The news was a bit of a surprise for fans who have been following the author's progress on the Mistborn screenplay. But unlike Sanderson's Apple TV deal for his Cosmere projects, the Skyward TV series does not currently have a streaming service attached.
paragraphs.cn: 近日有消息宣布，Brandon Sanderson将与Tomorrow Studios合作改编他广受欢迎的青少年（YA）系列Skyward。这一消息让那些长期关注他《迷雾之子（Mistborn）》剧本进度的粉丝有些意外。但与Sanderson将其Cosmere（寰宇）系列项目交给Apple TV的协议不同，Skyward电视剧目前还没有签约任何流媒体平台。

paragraphs.en: "I actually started meeting with [Tomorrow Studios] like four our five years ago," Sanderson said in his latest YouTube update. "It was right after the One Piece television show came out that I sat down seriously with them. I'd taken some meetings earlier, but this was the first time I'm like, 'All right, you really can make things that are good.'"
paragraphs.cn: 「其实我大概四五年前就开始和Tomorrow Studios接触了。」Sanderson在他最新一期YouTube视频中表示，「但真正认真坐下来谈，是在《海贼王》真人剧集播出之后。之前也有过几次会面，但那是我第一次觉得：『行，你们是真能做出好东西的。』」

paragraphs.en: Season 1 of the One Piece live-action show was first released on Netflix back in August 2023 and quickly became one of the most popular shows on the streaming service. The second season of the adaptation was released earlier this year and was critically received even better than the first season. IGN's review of Season 2 called it "nothing short of a miracle" thanks to how well it adapts Eiichiro Oda's absurd cartoony world.
paragraphs.cn: 《海贼王》真人剧集第一季于2023年8月在Netflix首播，迅速成为该平台最受欢迎的剧集之一。改编版第二季今年早些时候播出，口碑甚至比第一季还要更好。IGN对第二季的评价称其「堪称奇迹」，因为它把尾田荣一郎那个荒诞又带卡通感的世界还原得相当到位。

paragraphs.en: "There's a really cool exec there that I like a lot. We talked for a long while and eventually we said yes," explains Sanderson about the partnership with Tomorrow Studios. "So that's been in the works for a quite a while and we now picked our showrunners. It's Mo and Jed. They were the showrunners of Agents of SHIELD and they are fantastic people. They've been really good to work with an so we're working on that."
paragraphs.cn: 「他们那边有一位我非常欣赏的高管。我们聊了很久，最后我们答应了。」Sanderson这样解释他与Tomorrow Studios的合作，「所以这事其实已经筹备了一段时间，目前我们也定下了制作人——Mo和Jed。他们是《神盾局特工（Agents of SHIELD）》的制作人，人非常好，合作起来也很愉快。我们现在就在推进这个项目。」

paragraphs.en: Sanderson is talking bout Jed Whedon and Maurissa "Mo" Tancheroen here, who worked on the Marvel spin-off series between 2013 and 2020. For those who don't remember Agents of SHIELD, it was one of the more popular Marvel shows on TV before the Disney+ era of originals kicked off in 2021 with Wandavision.
paragraphs.cn: Sanderson这里说的是Jed Whedon和Maurissa「Mo」Tancheroen——这两位曾在2013到2020年间参与漫威这部衍生剧。对那些已经不记得《神盾局特工》的观众来说，它当年是漫威在电视端较为热门的一部剧——直到2021年迪士尼+凭借《旺达幻视（WandaVision）》开启原创剧时代之前。

paragraphs.en: In addition to providing more information about the Skyward adaptation, Sanderson also addressed that he has been overly busy with Hollywood lately, saying: "I do promise I'm getting back to the books very soon." During his update last week, he confirmed that he plans on starting work on Ghostbloods revisions again in July, which is the next era of his Mistborn series.
paragraphs.cn: 除了透露Skyward改编的更多细节，Sanderson也回应了自己最近被好莱坞事务搞得过于繁忙的状态：「我向大家保证，我很快就会回到写书上。」在上周的视频更新中，他确认计划于7月重新开始Ghostbloods的修订工作——这是他《迷雾之子》系列下一时代的故事。
